message:
feat(core): add AUTOINCREMENT/sqlite_sequence support, UNIQUE constraint enforcement, strict parity-cert mode, and collation-aware comparison

Major expansion of Connection to support AUTOINCREMENT semantics,
UNIQUE constraint enforcement in both VDBE and fallback paths, and
strict parity-cert mode for harness certification.

connection.rs (781 lines added):
- AUTOINCREMENT support: Track autoincrement_tables and
  sqlite_sequence_cache across the connection lifetime. Auto-create
  sqlite_sequence table on first AUTOINCREMENT table. Maintain
  high-water marks via refresh_autoincrement_sequence_after_insert(),
  upsert_sqlite_sequence_in_txn(), and read_sqlite_sequence_cache_in_txn().
  Wire AUTOINCREMENT sequence to VDBE engine via
  set_autoincrement_sequence_by_root_page().
  Handle DROP TABLE cleanup, ALTER TABLE RENAME propagation, and
  schema reload from pager for sqlite_sequence entries.

- UNIQUE constraint enforcement in fallback INSERT path: scan existing
  rows for duplicate non-NULL values on UNIQUE columns. Respect OR
  IGNORE (skip) and OR ABORT/FAIL (error). Partial REPLACE support.

- Implicit UNIQUE index creation: CREATE TABLE now detects column-level
  and table-level UNIQUE constraints and auto-creates
  sqlite_autoindex_<table>_N indexes with is_unique=true.

- Strict parity-cert mode (bd-zjisk.1): Add reject_mem_fallback_strict
  flag toggled via PRAGMA fsqlite.parity_cert_strict. When enabled,
  interpreted fallback dispatches (JOIN, GROUP BY, CTE, etc.) return
  hard errors instead of silently proceeding, enabling harness
  certification to detect unsupported code paths.
  log_mem_execution_fallback() now returns Result to propagate errors.

- COLLATE expression support: emit_expr() handles Expr::Collate by
  evaluating the inner expression. extract_collation() extracts the
  collation name. emit_binary_expr() passes P4::Collation to comparison
  opcodes for NOCASE/RTRIM support in the fallback path.

- total_changes() now uses the cumulative counter from fsqlite-func
  instead of the per-statement changes count. Connection::open() resets
  the cumulative counter.

compat_persist.rs:
- parse_columns_from_create_sql() now extracts UNIQUE constraint flag.
- Add is_autoincrement_table_sql() to detect AUTOINCREMENT keyword.
- Compute page count from max allocated page number across all schema
  entries instead of only master entries.

commit_repair.rs:
- Optimize batch validation by maintaining a single merged_committed set
  instead of cloning the committed snapshot per request.

region.rs:
- Reformat chained method calls in tests for readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
